Who I Am
About Me

I'm Sanjul Mishra — an MBA student at IIBS Bengaluru (BCU) specializing in Operations & Business Analytics. I don't just study operations — I execute them. From coordinating conclaves with 2,500+ participants to publishing academic research and leading university clubs, my record is built on getting things done.

I bridge the gap between strategy and ground-level execution. I've managed multi-stakeholder events across 30+ institutions, built research publications, edited university magazines, and volunteered at national-level sporting events — all while maintaining academic rigor.

My approach: structured thinking, disciplined execution, data-informed decisions. I bring that combination to every project, team, and challenge I take on.

Featured Case Study
NEXUS EDGE Conclave
Executive Student Coordinator · 2 Editions
NEXUS EDGE — Inter-Institutional Management Conclave
IIBS × Bengaluru City University · Jnana Jyothi Auditorium, Central College Campus, Bengaluru
2,500+
Total Participants
30+
Colleges Coordinated
2x
Editions Executed
100%
On-Time Delivery
Objective & Scale
  • Host a national-level inter-institutional management conclave on leadership, strategy, and tech-driven management
  • Coordinate 30+ colleges, industry speakers, sponsors, and 2,500+ participants across two editions
  • Deliver a zero-disruption event at Jnana Jyothi Auditorium, Central College Campus, Bengaluru
Constraints & Challenges
  • Multi-stakeholder coordination across colleges, faculty, sponsors, and university administration simultaneously
  • Real-time issue resolution during live event with no margin for delay or disruption
  • Securing sponsorships while maintaining alignment with institutional branding expectations
Actions Taken
  • Planned end-to-end event operations — registration, scheduling, logistics, and on-ground coordination
  • Managed communication across 30+ colleges, faculty, industry speakers, and internal teams
  • Drove sponsor outreach and alignment; handled real-time issue resolution on event day
  • Executed both 2K25 (Tech-Driven Management) and 2K26 (Unlock, Upgrade, Unleash Your Edge)
Outcome & Recognition
  • Both editions delivered on schedule with 2,500+ combined participants and zero major disruptions
  • Certificate of Appreciation from IIBS Principal Dr. Tripuraneni Jaggaiah for outstanding coordination
  • Commended by BCU-SMS for proactive involvement, meticulous planning, and seamless coordination
  • Cited as a benchmark for student leadership excellence at the institution
